title: vitis pallida
intro: Vitis pallida, also known as the greyleaf grapevine, is a species of grapevine native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Vitis pallida include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Vitis pallida include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by infusing the leaves and stems of the plant in hot water or a solvent.
